emails.subject: Re: Post ids
emails.body: Tana and Mark: This is the response I got from Curtis Smith regarding the report I send to you. I have never used an ERMS Report to my knowledge but will ask Dutch Quigley about it. I seem to be between a rock and a hard spot on this one. My manager. Mike Moscoso, is out today but will return tomorrow. I will ask him about this when he arrives. This aside, I will continue to look into this matter. Tobin Forwarded by Tobin Carlson/HOU/ECT on 02/17/2000 02:30 PM Curtis Smith 02/17/2000 11:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Post ids
emails.body: Re: Post ids Thanks for following up with this! It is critical we have accurate information on our positions. Continually busting our limits could subject the company to potentially substantial fines from the NYMEX. Please let me know what Mike's thoughts are...

emails.subject: Re: Post ids
emails.body: Mark and Tana: Enclosed is the note Mike sent to Curtis today. Hopefully this will get the ball rolling. Regards, TC Forwarded by Tobin Carlson/HOU/ECT on 02/18/2000 10:22 AM Enron North America Corp. From: Michael E Moscoso 02/18/2000 09:43 AM
